prompt: I want to monetize an API endpoint in my SE-2 dApp with micropayments. When someone calls my API, they should pay a small amount of USDC to access the data.
assertions: Uses x402 v2 API (paymentProxy, x402ResourceServer, HTTPFacilitatorClient)
Uses CAIP-2 network format (eip155:84532) not legacy names
A protected API route handler exists
Environment variables for facilitator, wallet, network configured
x402 packages added to nextjs package.json
